languages.text: "Естественно, процедура в высшей степени экспериментальная, и требует определенных вольностей в толковании канонов аугментации, а также интеграции компонентов, на которые Империум может смотреть... осуждающе. Но Омниссия учит нас преодолевать любые препоны ради дела постижения, особенно ради такой грандизной цели!"

"Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"
languages.original_text: "Естественно, процедура в высшей степени экспериментальная, и требует определенных вольностей в толковании канонов аугментации, а также интеграции компонентов, на которые Империум может смотреть... осуждающе. Но Омниссия учит нас преодолевать любые препоны ради дела постижения, особенно ради такой грандизной цели!"

traits.locale_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of Knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

"Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of Knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

"Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

"Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

languages.text: 「言うまでもなく、この手技はきわめて実験的であり、増強の規範についてある程度ゆるやかな解釈を要し、また、帝国の……不興を買うであろう構成要素の統合をも必要とします。しかしオムニッシアは、知識の名のもとにいかなる障害をも乗り越えよと我々に教えています――とりわけ、これほど重大な目標を追い求めるときには！」
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: 「言うまでもなく、この手技はきわめて実験的であり、増強の規範についてある程度ゆるやかな解釈を要し、また、帝国の……不興を買うであろう構成要素の統合をも必要とします。しかしオムニッシアは、知識の名のもとにいかなる障害をも乗り越えよと我々に教えています――とりわけ、これほど重大な目標を追い求めるときには！」

languages.text: “毋庸置疑，这一程序极具实验性，要求对植入物规范做出相当灵活的解释，同时还要整合可能会招致帝国……反对的组件。但欧姆尼赛亚教导我们，要以求知之名跨越一切阻碍，尤其是在追寻如此宏大目标之时！”
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: “毋庸置疑，这一程序极具实验性，要求对植入物规范做出相当灵活的解释，同时还要整合可能会招致帝国……反对的组件。但欧姆尼赛亚教导我们，要以求知之名跨越一切阻碍，尤其是在追寻如此宏大目标之时！”

languages.text: "Es versteht sich von selbst, dass die Prozedur experimenteller Natur ist und eine gewisse Freiheit ihrer Interpretation hinsichtlich des Augmentationskanons sowie die Integration von Komponenten erfordert, die dem Imperium wohl ... missfallen würden. Aber der Omnissiah lehrt uns, Hindernisse im Namen des Wissens zu überwinden, insbesondere, wenn man ein derart bedeutsames Ziel verfolgt.
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: "Es versteht sich von selbst, dass die Prozedur experimenteller Natur ist und eine gewisse Freiheit ihrer Interpretation hinsichtlich des Augmentationskanons sowie die Integration von Komponenten erfordert, die dem Imperium wohl ... missfallen würden. Aber der Omnissiah lehrt uns, Hindernisse im Namen des Wissens zu überwinden, insbesondere, wenn man ein derart bedeutsames Ziel verfolgt.

languages.text: « Il va sans dire que cette procédure est hautement expérimentale et nécessite une interprétation relativement souple des canons de l'augmentation, ainsi que l'intégration de composants que l'Imperium pourrait... voir d'un mauvais œil. Mais l'Omnimessie nous apprend à surmonter tous les obstacles au nom de la connaissance, surtout au service d'un objectif d'une telle importance ! »
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: « Il va sans dire que cette procédure est hautement expérimentale et nécessite une interprétation relativement souple des canons de l'augmentation, ainsi que l'intégration de composants que l'Imperium pourrait... voir d'un mauvais œil. Mais l'Omnimessie nous apprend à surmonter tous les obstacles au nom de la connaissance, surtout au service d'un objectif d'une telle importance ! »

languages.text: «Evidentemente, el proceso es completamente experimental y exige una interpretación un tanto flexible de los cánones de aumento, así como la integración de componentes que el Imperium vería con... desagrado. Pero el Omnissiah nos enseña a superar cualquier obstáculo en nombre del conocimiento, ¡especialmente al perseguir objetivos de este calibre!».
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: «Evidentemente, el proceso es completamente experimental y exige una interpretación un tanto flexible de los cánones de aumento, así como la integración de componentes que el Imperium vería con... desagrado. Pero el Omnissiah nos enseña a superar cualquier obstáculo en nombre del conocimiento, ¡especialmente al perseguir objetivos de este calibre!».

languages.text: "Söylemeye gerek yok, prosedür son derece deneysel ve ogmentasyon nizamnameleri konusunda belirli bir esneklik gerektirmesinin yanı sıra İmparatorluk'un... Hoşnutsuzluğunu çekecek bileşenlerin entegrasyonunu da şart koşuyor. Fakat Hermesih bize, özellikle de böylesine büyük bir amacın peşindeyken irfan adına her türlü engeli aşmamızı öğretiyor!"
languages.original_text: "Needless to say, the procedure is highly experimental and demands a certain looseness of interpretation in regard to augmentation canons, as well as integration of components that would incur the Imperium's... disapproval. But the Omnissiah teaches us to surmount any obstacles in the name of knowledge, especially when pursuing a goal of such magnitude!"

traits.locale_text: "Söylemeye gerek yok, prosedür son derece deneysel ve ogmentasyon nizamnameleri konusunda belirli bir esneklik gerektirmesinin yanı sıra İmparatorluk'un... Hoşnutsuzluğunu çekecek bileşenlerin entegrasyonunu da şart koşuyor. Fakat Hermesih bize, özellikle de böylesine büyük bir amacın peşindeyken irfan adına her türlü engeli aşmamızı öğretiyor!"
